summary: Bug fix verification for Dream List zero-value issue. When Dream List count = 0, the 'Value of Dream Records' was incorrectly showing stale values ($65) instead of $0, and the comparison toggle was still visible. All fixes verified: Backend safeguard at lines 145-146 (valuation.py) returns total_value: 0 when total_count = 0. Frontend comparison toggle (line 403 CollectionPage.js) now checks wishlistItems.length > 0 before displaying. Profile page (line 537 ProfilePage.js) now checks dreamValue.total_count > 0 before showing dream value.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend safeguard in valuation.py correctly checks total_count before returning value - if 0 items, always returns 0 value
Frontend comparison toggle in CollectionPage.js correctly checks: collectionValue.total_value > 0 AND wishlistItems.length > 0 AND dreamlistValue.total_value > 0
ProfilePage.js correctly checks dreamValue.total_count > 0 before displaying 'Value of Dream Records'
DreamDebtHeader in CollectionPage.js correctly shows empty state 'Your dreams are currently free' when itemCount = 0
handleConfirmCleanse, handleWishlistToISO, handleDeleteWishlistItem all refetch dreamlist data from backend to stay in sync
seed_data_creation: No test data created - tested existing demouser state (3 IGOR variants in collection, 0 items in Dream List)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dream List zero-value bug fix verified. Test user 'demouser' has 3 records (IGOR variants: Red, Mint, Standard Black Vinyl) and 0 Dream List items. Backend API correctly returns total_value: 0 when total_count: 0. Frontend comparison toggle (data-testid='reality-check-toggle') correctly hidden when Dream List is empty.

features_tested.backend_dreamlist_zero_safeguard: PASS - GET /api/valuation/dreamlist returns total_value: 0 when total_count: 0
features_tested.backend_dreamlist_public_zero_safeguard: PASS - GET /api/valuation/dreamlist/{username} returns total_value: 0 when total_count: 0
features_tested.frontend_comparison_toggle_hidden: PASS - data-testid='reality-check-toggle' does NOT exist when Dream List is empty
features_tested.frontend_header_zero_count: PASS - Header shows '0 on Dream List'
features_tested.frontend_dream_debt_header_empty_state: PASS - Shows 'Your dreams are currently free' when itemCount = 0
features_tested.frontend_profile_no_dream_value: PASS - Profile does NOT show 'Value of Dream Records' when Dream List empty

bug_fix_summary.original_bug: When Dream List count = 0, the 'Value of Dream Records' was showing $65 instead of $0, and comparison toggle was visible with stale value
bug_fix_summary.root_cause: 1) Frontend optimistic state update in handleConfirmCleanse added value without updating wishlistItems count, 2) No frontend guard on comparison toggle checking wishlistItems.length, 3) No backend safeguard for zero-count returning $0
fixes_applied: Backend: Lines 145-146 in valuation.py - check total_count == 0 before any calculations, return {total_value: 0, valued_count: 0, total_count: 0}
Backend: Lines 200-202 in valuation.py - same safeguard for public endpoint
Frontend: Line 403 in CollectionPage.js - comparison toggle only shows when wishlistItems.length > 0 AND dreamlistValue.total_value > 0
Frontend: Line 537 in ProfilePage.js - dreamValue display only shows when dreamValue.total_count > 0
Frontend: Lines 208-211 in CollectionPage.js - handleConfirmCleanse refetches dreamlist data from backend after move
Frontend: Lines 254-260 in CollectionPage.js - handleWishlistToISO forces value to 0 if last item
Frontend: Lines 280-286 in CollectionPage.js - handleDeleteWishlistItem forces value to 0 if last item
bug_fix_summary.verification: All fixes verified - backend returns 0 value for 0 count, frontend hides comparison toggle and dream value display when Dream List is empty
